summary: Completed testing of Configuracion Panel with 3 tabs (Automatizacion, WhatsApp, IA). All 13 backend tests passed and all frontend UI tests passed. Backend APIs for automation rules CRUD, WhatsApp config, AI config, and Meta webhook verification all working correctly.
passed_tests: Login with admin@fakulti.com / admin123 successful
GET /api/automation/rules - returns 10 seeded rules with correct structure
POST /api/automation/rules - create new rule with all fields
PATCH /api/automation/rules/{id}/toggle - toggle active/inactive works
DELETE /api/automation/rules/{id} - delete rule works
GET /api/config/whatsapp - returns config with masked token
PUT /api/config/whatsapp - save config works
POST /api/config/whatsapp/test - returns error without real credentials (expected)
GET /api/webhook/whatsapp?hub.mode=subscribe&hub.verify_token=fakulti-whatsapp-verify-token&hub.challenge=12345 - returns '12345'
GET /api/webhook/whatsapp with wrong token returns 403
POST /api/webhook/whatsapp - accepts Meta format incoming message
GET /api/config/ai - returns ai config with 4 toggles
PUT /api/config/ai - update toggles works
Frontend: Configuracion page loads with 3 tabs (Automatizacion, WhatsApp, IA)
Frontend: Automation tab shows 10 rules with toggle switches
Frontend: Toggle switches work (click toggles active state)
Frontend: 'Nueva Regla' button opens create dialog
Frontend: Rule form dialog has name, trigger_type, action_type fields
Frontend: Creating rule via UI works (rule appears after save)
Frontend: WhatsApp tab shows Webhook URL field with correct URL
Frontend: WhatsApp tab shows Verify Token field (fakulti-whatsapp-verify-token)
Frontend: WhatsApp tab shows Phone Number ID and Access Token fields
Frontend: 'Guardar Configuracion' and 'Probar Conexion' buttons present
Frontend: Test connection shows 'Credenciales no configuradas' error (expected)
Frontend: AI tab shows 4 toggle cards (intent_analysis, lead_classification, product_recommendation, suggested_responses)
Frontend: AI toggles are functional (click toggles and saves)
seed_data_creation: 10 automation rules seeded at startup, WhatsApp config with default verify_token, AI config with all toggles enabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configuracion panel fully implemented and tested. The panel has 3 tabs: Automatizacion (CRUD for bot rules with trigger_type/action_type), WhatsApp (Business Cloud API config with webhook verification), and IA (4 feature toggles). Meta WhatsApp webhook at GET /api/webhook/whatsapp verifies with verify_token 'fakulti-whatsapp-verify-token'. POST /api/webhook/whatsapp accepts Meta webhook format. WhatsApp sending requires real credentials (phone_number_id and access_token) which are not configured - test connection returns expected error.
